name: Kindergarten Coins & Collectibles — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for sorting collections, noticing features, and care for objects. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with sorting collections, noticing features, and care for objects.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about sorting collections, noticing features, and care for objects through a guided practice with sorting collections, noticing features, and care for objects.
